fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF, is highlighted as one of ten such instruments designed to lose value, according to InvestorPlace. This cautionary note suggests significant headwinds for the ETF, potentially driven by its complex structure and the inherent decay of leveraged products over time. Investors should be aware of the high risks associated with holding such instruments.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY ATLs. Iran war "adventure" shorts all closed as of today. Year more than made, back to only holding the core short.
With everyone leaving for the Hamptons, late Friday afternoon into a long weekend can contain considerable geopolitcal risk $SQQQ $UVXY
